calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kathryn Murphy for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it looked at the issue about naming the grandchildren, and the Special Needs Trust can be established. Ms. Murphy spoke of the will, the charity's objection to the sponsor being named as an independent contact, and revocability/irrevocability of the grandchildren.

The 1) First Amended First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc., and 2) Petition of Executor Dale Bolan for order for Preliminary Distribution, Approving Execution of 3rd Party Pooled Special Needs Trust Sponsor Agreement and Establishing Trust Account under Master Trust Agreement are Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Wu. Not reported.

Petition Of Executor Dale Boland For Order For Preliminary Distribution Approving Execution Of 3rd Party Pooled Special Needs Trust Sponsor Agreement And Establishing Trust Account Under Master Trust Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Continued To Oct-02-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Executor Dale Boland For Order For Preliminary Distribution Approving Execution Of 3rd Party Pooled Special Needs Trust Sponsor Agreement And Establishing Trust Account Under Master Trust Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Continued To Oct-02-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Executor Dale Boland For Order For Preliminary Distribution Approving Execution Of 3rd Party Pooled Special Needs Trust Sponsor Agreement And Establishing Trust Account Under Master Trust Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Continued To Sep-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Continued To Sep-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kathryn Murphy for and with Dale Boland (Petitioner/Executor).

The Court questions whether they are going to be able to file a separate petition to establish a pooled special needs trust. Ms. Murphy stated that her Client wants to fund her Sister's trust, that they can't follow exactly what is under the will, that they can't establish the trust because they can't get a trustee to accept the terms of the trust and that she provided another option in her papers. The Court explained what the process should be. Ms. Murphy stated that she can file a petition next week and that they need to know how the Court is going to rule on the family allowances. The Court indicated that the family allowances would be allowed, but not approved. The First Amended First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is continued to September 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The new trust petition is to be given a hearing date of August 7, 2019.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Continued To Jun-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Apr-03-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Continued To Apr-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kathryn Murphy for Dale Boland (Executor).

Ms. Murphy stated that she was appearing today to ask for an additional continuance, that they have discovered additional assets, that the decedent and her husband had accounts in New York, that the decedent didn't close everything in New York, and that there are loose ends that are coming to light. The Court continued the matter to April 3, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a report on status. Ms. Murphy stated that they may get to the final petition within 30 days. The Court stated that if the petition for final distribution is not on file then a petition to approve status of administration must be filed.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy K. Chan. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Continued To Mar-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kathryn Murphy for Dale Boland.

Ms. Murphy stated that she takes full responsibility for not calendaring the compliance hearing date of January 2nd, that both she and her Client had medical issues this past year, that her Client is moving and looking for documents, and that she believes she can have the petition filed within 30-days. Status on close of estate is continued to March 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Off Calendar
